zh.lifeSummary: 當Heilwige van Roode於1117年出生在荷蘭蓋爾德藍德布洛可斯特時，她的父親Arnoud Boudewijnsz van Heusden58歲，母親Heilwig van Malsen58歲。她於1130年與Gijsbert I van Bronckhorst結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1154年1月12日在荷蘭利包格享年37歲，埋葬在荷蘭努-布拉班特阿萊姆 麻仁 凱瑟爾。

nameMeanings.name: van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Roode
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of Norwegian   Ruud   or   Rud  .

variants.name: Rood
meanings: Dutch: nickname for someone with red hair, from Middle Dutch ro(e)de ‘red’.
English: topographic name for someone who lived by a village or town cross (Middle English rōde, roode, Old English rōd(e)).

English: topographic name for someone who lived by a woodland clearing, from an unrecorded Middle English rōd(e), rood, Old English rēod(e). This name would have been synonymous with Road (see Rhode 1) and the two names were therefore interchangeable, especially in Somerset and Devon.

nameMeanings.name: Heilwige
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Heilwige van Roode was born in 1117, in Bronckhorst, Gelderland, Netherlands, her father, Arnoud Boudewijnsz van Heusden, was 58 and her mother, Heilwig van Malsen, was 58. She married Gijsbert I van Bronckhorst in 1130. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 12 January 1154, in Limburg, Netherlands, at the age of 37, and was buried in Alem Maren Kessel, North Brabant, Netherlands.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Heilwige van Roode est née en 1117, à Bronckhorst, Gueldre, Pays-Bas, son père, Arnoud Boudewijnsz van Heusden, avait 58 ans et sa mère, Heilwig van Malsen, avait 58 ans. Elle a épousé Gijsbert I van Bronckhorst en 1130. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 12 janvier 1154, à Limbourg, Pays-Bas, à l’âge de 37 ans, et a été enterrée à Alem Maren Kessel, Brabant-septentrional, Pays-Bas.

de.lifeSummary: Als Heilwige van Roode 1117 in Bronckhorst, Geldern, Niederlande geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Arnoud Boudewijnsz van Heusden 58 und ihre Mutter Heilwig van Malsen 58. Sie hat 1130 Gijsbert I van Bronckhorst geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 12. Januar 1154 im Alter von 37 Jahren in Limburg, Niederlande und wurde in Alem Maren Kessel, Nord-Brabant, Niederlande begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Heilwige van Roode è nata il nel 1117 nel Bronckhorst, Gelderland, Paesi Bassi, sua padre, Arnoud Boudewijnsz van Heusden, aveva 58 anni e sua madre, Heilwig van Malsen, aveva 58 anni. Lei sposato Gijsbert I van Bronckhorst nel 1130. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 12 gennaio 1154, nel Limburgo, Paesi Bassi, all'età di 37 anni, e fu sepolta a Alem Maren Kessel, Brabante settentrionale, Paesi Bassi.

ja.lifeSummary: Heilwige van Roodeが1117年にオランダジェルダーランドブロンックhオルストで生まれた時，父Arnoud Boudewijnsz van Heusdenは58歳，母Heilwig van Malsenは58歳であった。1130年にGijsbert I van Bronckhorstと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1154年1月12日にオランダリンブルグで37歳で死去し，オランダノオルド-ブラバントアレム マレン ケセルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Heilwige van Roode(이)가 1117년 네덜란드 글델랜드 브론크호르스트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Arnoud Boudewijnsz van Heusden(은)는 58세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Heilwig van Malsen(은)는 58세였다. 그녀는 1130년 Gijsbert I van Bronckhorst(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1154년 1월 12일 네덜란드 림버그에서 37세의 나이로 사망했으며 네덜란드 노르드-브라반트 알렘 마 케셀에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Heilwige van Roode nasceu em 1117, em Bronckhorst, Gheldria, Países Baixos, seu pai, Arnoud Boudewijnsz van Heusden, tinha 58 anos e sua mãe, Heilwig van Malsen, tinha 58 anos. Ela casou-se com Gijsbert I van Bronckhorst em 1130. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 12 de janeiro de 1154, em Limburgo, Países Baixos, com 37 anos, e foi sepultada em Alem Maren Kessel, Brabante do Norte, Países Baixos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Heilwige van Roode родилась в 1117 г. в местности бронккхаурст, джелдирланд, Нидерланды, её отцу по имени Arnoud Boudewijnsz van Heusden было 58 лет, а матери, которую звали Heilwig van Malsen, 58. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Gijsbert I van Bronckhorst в 1130 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 12 января 1154 г. в местности лимбург, Нидерланды в возрасте 37 лет и была похоронена в местности алем марен кессел, нурд-брабант, Нидерланды.

es.Meierij van 's-Hertogenbosch, Brabant-se: Meierij van 's-Hertogenbosch, Brabante del Norte, Países Bajos
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Heilwige van Roode nació en 1117, en Bronckhorst, Gelderland, Países Bajos, su papá, Arnoud Boudewijnsz van Heusden, tenía 58 años y su mamá, Heilwig van Malsen, tenía 58 años. Se casó con Gijsbert I van Bronckhorst en 1130. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 12 de enero de 1154, en Limburg, Países Bajos, a la edad de 37 años, y fue sepultada en Alem Maren Kessel, Brabante del Norte, Países Bajos.
